시편 92:1.content: It is a good thing to give thanks to Yahweh, to sing praises to your name, Most High,

시편 92:2.content: to proclaim your loving kindness in the morning, and your faithfulness every night,

시편 92:3.content: with the ten-stringed lute, with the harp, and with the melody of the lyre.

시편 92:4.content: For you, Yahweh, have made me glad through your work. I will triumph in the works of your hands.

시편 92:5.content: How great are your works, Yahweh! Your thoughts are very deep.

시편 92:6.content: A senseless man doesn’t know, neither does a fool understand this:

시편 92:7.content: though the wicked spring up as the grass, and all the evildoers flourish, they will be destroyed forever.

시편 92:8.content: But you, Yahweh, are on high forever more.

시편 92:9.content: For, behold, your enemies, Yahweh, for, behold, your enemies shall perish. All the evildoers will be scattered.

시편 92:10.content: But you have exalted my horn like that of the wild ox. I am anointed with fresh oil.

시편 92:11.content: My eye has also seen my enemies. My ears have heard of the wicked enemies who rise up against me.

시편 92:12.content: The righteous shall flourish like the palm tree. He will grow like a cedar in Lebanon.

시편 92:13.content: They are planted in Yahweh’s house. They will flourish in our God’s courts.

시편 92:14.content: They will still produce fruit in old age. They will be full of sap and green,

시편 92:15.content: to show that Yahweh is upright. He is my rock, and there is no unrighteousness in him.
